DzTestClass

Base class for testing the doc parser pipeline.

Inherits :

  • QObject
    • DzBase
      • DzElement

Properties

Stringlabel
Numbercount
Booleanvisible
Arrayitems
DzRenderMgr::RenderPrioritypriority

Methods

void setLabel( String label )
String getLabel()
Boolean findChild( String name, Boolean recursive=false )
void overloaded( String name )
void overloaded( Number index, Boolean flag=false )
String className()

Signals

void labelChanged( String newLabel )

Detailed Description

Methods

void : setLabel( String label )

Sets the label of the object.

Parameter(s):

  • label - The new label to assign.

Since:

  • 4.6.0.0

String : getLabel()

Returns the label of the object.

Return Value:

  • The current label string.

Since:

  • 4.6.0.0

Boolean : findChild( String name, Boolean recursive )

Searches for a child with the given name.

Parameter(s):

  • name - The name to search for.
  • recursive - Whether to search recursively.

Return Value:

  • true if the child was found, otherwise false.

void : overloaded( String name )

Overload taking a name string.

void : overloaded( Number index, Boolean flag )

Overload taking an index and flag.

String : className()

Returns the class name of the object.

Return Value:

  • A string representation of the class name.

Properties

String : label

The display label for the object.

Since:

  • 4.5.0.0

Signals

void : labelChanged( String newLabel )

Emitted when the label changes.
